name: TSF Magical Chocolates
description:
You and your roommate, Jake are once again, wishing for female company that'll never come. So it's only fair that when you find a box of seemingly ordinary chocolates sitting at your apartment doorstep after all these years of neither of you having anyone confess their love to either of you two, you'd at least want to know why something like this would happen, wouldn't you? And surely giving one of those ordinary chocolates a try wouldn't hurt...right? (Originally a Valentine's Day bot but now edited to fit a more everyday situation)

Img source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/115906374
creator: GK_
